scripts.dev: pnpm run build:email && OPENWORK_DEV_MODE=1 tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.dev:local: pnpm run build:email && sh -lc 'OPENWORK_DEV_MODE=1 PORT=${DEN_API_PORT:-8790} tsx watch src/server.ts'
scripts.seed:demo-org: pnpm run build:den-db && sh -lc 'DEN_WEB_PORT=${DEN_WEB_PORT:-3005}; OPENWORK_DEV_MODE=${OPENWORK_DEV_MODE:-1} DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-mysql://root:password@127.0.0.1:3306/openwork_den} DEN_DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY=${DEN_DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-local-dev-db-encryption-key-please-change-1234567890} BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=${BETTER_AUTH_SECRET:-local-dev-secret-not-for-production-use!!} BETTER_AUTH_URL=${BETTER_AUTH_URL:-http://localhost:$DEN_WEB_PORT} tsx scripts/seed-demo-org.ts'
